name: Double Mocha Madness (Recipe for Caramel Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast and skin the hazelnuts, then allow them to cool to room temperature.
2. In a food processor with a metal blade, chop the hazelnuts into pieces about 1/8 inch in size.
3. Combine 1/2 cup granulated sugar and 1 tsp lemon juice in a saucepan.
4. Caramelize the sugar over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until it turns clear and light brown.
5. Pour the caramelized sugar over the chopped hazelnuts and stir.
6. Spread the mixture into an uneven mass about 4 to 5 inches in diameter.
7. Allow the pralines to cool to room temperature, then break them into pieces.
8. Chop the broken pieces into 1/8-inch pieces and transfer to a plastic container with a lid.
9. Freeze until needed.
Makes 1 1/2 quarts
